source_note: Sweden introduced the sex purchase ban in 1999; important baseline for 2000 map.
Denmark partly decriminalized prostitution in 1999; verify with Danish legal source before publication.
General ban on brothels lifted on 2000-10-01; voluntary adult brothel prostitution became licensed/legalized.
German Prostitution Act has existed since 2002 and improved sex workers' legal position; voluntary prostitution generally allowed.
Law 17.515 on Sex Work came into force on 2002-07-02; verify statute text before publication.
Prostitution Reform Act 2003 commenced in June 2003 and decriminalized prostitution; source page may require JS but is official.
Partial ban criminalized purchase from a trafficking/procuring victim; general adult sale/purchase not fully buyer-criminalized.
Iceland removed the ban on selling sex in 2007; verify official Icelandic source before publication.
Norway criminalized purchase of sex in 2009.
Iceland criminalized purchase of sex in 2009 after decriminalizing sale in 2007.
Policing and Crime Act 2009 introduced strict liability offence for paying for sexual services of a person subjected to force.
PCEPA created offence prohibiting purchasing sexual services and communication for that purpose.
Northern Ireland introduced offence of purchasing sexual services in 2015; country-level UK remains mixed.
France introduced legislation to criminalize purchase of sex in 2016.
Criminal Law (Sexual Offences) Act 2017 includes Part 4: Purchase of Sexual Services.
Northern Territory Sex Industry Act 2019 objects include decriminalising sex work and legalising sex work contracts.
Prohibition on Prostitution Consumption Law makes paying or attempting to pay for sex an administrative offence.
Belgian sexual criminal law reform took effect on 2022-06-01 and decriminalized third parties around sex work.
Victoria decriminalization staged from May 2022, removing most offences and adding anti-discrimination protections.
Victoria second phase expected in late 2023 to repeal licensing system; verify final commencement before publication.
Queensland decriminalising sex work amendment passed 2024-05-02 and commenced 2024-08-02.
Belgian Parliament voted a sex-work labour law in May 2024; employment protections followed decriminalization.
